name: Vita Health Omega 3 Cod Liver Oil - 200ml
description: Vita Health Omega 3 Cod Liver Oil with Vitamins A&D - the ultimate nutritional supplement to support your furry friend's health naturally. Packed with essential Omega 3, including EPA and DHA, this premium quality unique fish oil blend offers a wide range of benefits. Cod Liver Oil is a rich source of vitamin A, a crucial nutrient known for its positive impact on the immune system, cellular growth, eye health, and reproduction in dogs. Additionally, it boasts high levels of omega-3 fatty acids, which play a vital role in reducing inflammation and preventing blood clot formation. Key Benefits: Omega-3 Rich : Provides a potent source of EPA and DHA, which are crucial for maintaining a healthy heart, brain, and joints. Skin and Coat Health : Helps to reduce shedding, improve skin hydration, and promote a glossy, vibrant coat. Joint Support : Aids in reducing inflammation and supports joint mobility, making it ideal for pets with arthritis or joint issues. Digestive Health : Supports a healthy digestive system and can help with digestive discomfort. Facilitates proper eye function and health Easy to Administer : Comes in a convenient liquid form, making it easy to mix with your pet’s food. Ingredients: Cod Liver Oil Omega-3 Fatty Acids (EPA and DHA) Vitamin A Vitamin D Feeding Guidelines: Add to your pet’s food. Dosage will vary based on the size and weight of your pet. 1/2 teaspoon per 10kg of weight or as recommended by your vet. Use: This formula is carefully crafted to ensure maximum absorption, ensuring that your dog receives the full benefits of these essential nutrients. By adding Vita Health Omega 3 Cod Liver Oil to your dog's daily routine, you're providing them with the nutritional support they need for a vibrant and active life. Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Give your pet the gift of health and vitality with VitaHealth Omega-3 Cod Liver Oil. Their health and happiness are worth it!
